violations.text: Coconut milk soup was observed held at 117 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Duck was observed thawing in stagnant water on a shelf. PIC stated it was an employee's food. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Employees' personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Aluminum wrap and paper towels are used to line surfaces in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Small beverage refrigerator in kitchen is on a wood board. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris wall shelves wire shelves air drying rack kitchen carts light covers wok unit freezer electrical outlets & conduits door handles of all refrigerators food containers have an accumulation of stickers New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The floors, walls, ceiling, and ledge along the wall have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The floor in areas of the kitchen is in poor repair. physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The floor and wall juncture behind the lowboy used for storage do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
